calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-048 substrate readiness: 4-arm interoceptive-noise sweep
items.note: SD-048 substrate-readiness diagnostic mirroring V3-EXQ-509 (SD-047) at the body-state layer. 4-arm interoceptive-noise sweep {OFF / 0.25x / 1.0x / 4.0x} on CausalGridWorldV2 with limb_damage_enabled=True. Sparse random policy (80% stay) on 12x12 / 1 hazard / 1 resource so the agent has quiet steps where body noise can register independent of contact. 7 pre-registered acceptance criteria (C0 OFF bit-identical, C1a/C1b ARM_1 sources firing + body_noise positive, C2a ARM_2 calibration band [0.5, 5.0], C2b autonomic + sensitisation both fire, C2c monotone ARM_1 -> ARM_2, C3a ARM_3 at-or-above ARM_2). Local-machine simulation (3 seeds x 400 ticks) confirms all 7 checks PASS with ratios ARM_1=0.80, ARM_2=2.69, ARM_3=2.94. PASS routes to V3-EXQ-512 ARC-058 / ARC-033 comparator-gap behavioural test queueing decision; FAIL on C2a routes to recalibration successor V3-EXQ-511a per SD doc interpretation grid.
